programs.title: Flowers of Yunnan Ep.2
programs.desc: A panoramic view of Yunnan's flower industry and its vibrant culture, woven through four thematic threads. From mountains to rainforests, this documentary showcases the region's floral resources while shedding light on each species and the technological innovation driving the industry.

programs.title: China Untapped: Xizang Ep.1
programs.desc: Follow traveling host He Tianran as he explores Xizang's many cultural treasures. Take in the majesty of the Potala Palace, discover intangible cultural heritage skills such as Tibetan paper making and Tibetan incense, and experience the plateau's natural wonders in a whole new light.

programs.title: Song Dynasty Poetry: Beauty Across Time Ep.1
programs.desc: Through the lens of Song dynasty poetry, this documentary brings to life the era's great poets, their works, and the stories behind them. By delving into their values and worldview, it reveals the deeper spirit within the culture, resulting in a work that is at once thoughtful, artistic, and deeply human.
